substep.title: Flip Design Status to Locked
substep.action:
Edit {{design_path}} frontmatter: status: "active" → status: "accepted".
Accepted status signals to S/P/I phases that D is settled; loop-back to D requires user re-engagement and resets the strike counter.

substep.title: Stamp Frontmatter
substep.action: uv run {base_dir}/scripts/stamp-frontmatter.py --file "{{design_path}}" --note "D-phase locked after brain-surgery alignment; {{plan_count}} plan(s) identified; {{strike_count}} foundational reversals during D"

substep.title: Emit Handoff
